institution.name: Southwest Virginia Community College
institution.address: 369 College Road       US Rt. 19, 6 Miles S. Claypool Hill

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southwest Virginia Community College rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 (18.9% → 23.4%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southwest Virginia Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (50.8% → 61.2%).
